info.title: Vaults.fyi API
info.description: The Vaults.fyi V2 API offers a streamlined, better structured, and more performant interface for accessing DeFi vault data. This simplified version delivers optimized performance while maintaining comprehensive coverage across networks. Basic API key use is limited to 10 requests per minute.

get.description: Retrieves a filtered list of vaults with their basic information including address, network, associated asset details, and transactional support status.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (starting from 0)

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: Number of items per page

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Include only vaults with provided network(name or CAIP)

parameters.name: assetSymbol
parameters.description: Include only vaults with an asset of provided symbol(ticker)

parameters.name: onlyTransactional
parameters.description: Include only vaults that are supported in the transactional interface.

parameters.name: onlyAppFeatured
parameters.description: Include only vaults that are featured in app.vaults.fyi

parameters.name: allowCorrupted
parameters.description: Allow inclusion of corrupted vaults.

itemsOnPage.description: Number of items on the current page

decimals.description: Number of decimals of the asset

assetPriceInUsd.description: Price of the asset in USD

assetGroup.description: Group of the asset, e.g., ETH, USD, EURO, BTC, OTHER

isTransactional.description: Indicates if the vault supports transactional endpoints

isAppFeatured.description: Indicates if the vault is featured in app.vaults.fyi

items.description: Array of items on the current page

enum: API key required. Please contact vaults.fyi support at https://t.me/vaultsfyisupport or email (support@wallfacer.io) for further assistance.
This endpoint is only available to vaults.fyi PRO subscribers. Please upgrade your API key to access this feature.
The provided API key has exhausted its available credits. Please contact vaults.fyi support at https://t.me/vaultsfyisupport or email (support@wallfacer.io) for further assistance.

get.description: Retrieves historical APY and TVL for a specific vault, based on the provided query parameters.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (starting from 0)

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: Number of items per page

parameters.name: apyInterval
parameters.description: Interval for APY data. Possible values: 1day, 7day, 30day

parameters.name: granularity
parameters.description: Granularity for historical data (even intervals starting from epoch 0). Possible values: 1hour, 1day, 1week

parameters.name: fromTimestamp
parameters.description: Timestamp for the start of the time period for which data will be fetched

parameters.name: toTimestamp
parameters.description: Timestamp for the end of the time period for which data will be fetched

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Include only vaults with provided network(name or CAIP)

parameters.name: vaultAddress
parameters.description: Address of the vault for which the data will be returned

200.description: Historical TVL and APY data for a vault, paginated by timestamp

itemsOnPage.description: Number of items on the current page

blockNumber.description: Block number of the data point

items.description: Array of items on the current page

schema.description: Historical TVL and APY data for a vault, paginated by timestamp

enum: API key required. Please contact vaults.fyi support at https://t.me/vaultsfyisupport or email (support@wallfacer.io) for further assistance.
This endpoint is only available to vaults.fyi PRO subscribers. Please upgrade your API key to access this feature.
The provided API key has exhausted its available credits. Please contact vaults.fyi support at https://t.me/vaultsfyisupport or email (support@wallfacer.io) for further assistance.

get.description: Retrieves historical USD prices for a specific asset on a given network.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (starting from 0)

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: Number of items per page

parameters.name: granularity
parameters.description: Granularity for historical data (even intervals starting from epoch 0). Possible values: 1hour, 1day, 1week

parameters.name: fromTimestamp
parameters.description: Timestamp for the start of the time period for which data will be fetched

parameters.name: toTimestamp
parameters.description: Timestamp for the end of the time period for which data will be fetched

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Include only vaults with provided network(name or CAIP)

parameters.name: assetAddress
parameters.description: Asset address to get the historical prices for

200.description: Historical price data for an asset, paginated by timestamp

itemsOnPage.description: Number of items on the current page

timestamp.description: Aggregating timestamp of the price data point

items.description: Array of items on the current page

schema.description: Historical price data for an asset, paginated by timestamp

get.description: Retrieves a comprehensive list of vaults with detailed performance metrics including APY, TVL, rewards, risk scores, and protocol information based on specified filters.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (starting from 0)

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: Number of items per page

parameters.name: allowedAssets
parameters.description: Assets to be included by symbol(ticker).

parameters.name: disallowedAssets
parameters.description: Assets to be excluded by symbol(ticker). The parameter is ignored if "allowedAssets" is specified.

parameters.name: allowedProtocols
parameters.description: Protocols to be included by name.

parameters.name: disallowedProtocols
parameters.description: Protocols to be excluded by name. The parameter is ignored if "allowedProtocols" is specified.

parameters.name: minTvl
parameters.description: Minimum TVL in USD of the vaults to be included

parameters.name: minVaultScore
parameters.description: Minimum vault score required for a vault to be included

parameters.name: onlyTransactional
parameters.description: Include only vaults that are supported in the transactional interface.

parameters.name: onlyAppFeatured
parameters.description: Include only vaults that are featured in app.vaults.fyi

parameters.name: allowCorrupted
parameters.description: Allow inclusion of corrupted vaults.

parameters.name: allowVaultsWithWarnings
parameters.description: Whether to include vaults with warnings. Defaults to true.

items.description: Include only vaults with provided network(name or CAIP)

parameters.name: allowedNetworks
parameters.description: Networks to be included (name or CAIP).

items.description: Include only vaults with provided network(name or CAIP)

parameters.name: disallowedNetworks
parameters.description: Networks to be excluded (name or CAIP). The parameter is ignored if "allowedNetworks" is specified.

parameters.name: maxTvl
parameters.description: Maximum TVL in USD of the vaults to be included

parameters.name: maxApy
parameters.description: Maximum APY (in decimal) of the vaults to be included

parameters.name: minApy
parameters.description: Minimum APY (in decimal) of the vaults to be included

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Tags to be included.

parameters.name: curators
parameters.description: Curators to be included.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: Sort order, either asc or desc. Ascending is default.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort by

itemsOnPage.description: Number of items on the current page

decimals.description: Number of decimals of the asset

assetPriceInUsd.description: Price of the asset in USD

assetGroup.description: Group of the asset, e.g., ETH, USD, EURO, BTC, OTHER

isTransactional.description: Indicates if the vault supports transactional endpoints

isAppFeatured.description: Indicates if the vault is featured in app.vaults.fyi

totalCount.description: Number of holders of the vault

totalBalance.description: Total balance of the vault holders

lpTokenBalance.description: Balance of the LP token of the holder

lastUpdateTimestamp.description: Timestamp of the last vault data update

decimals.description: Number of decimals of the asset

assetPriceInUsd.description: Price of the asset in USD

assetGroup.description: Group of the asset, e.g., ETH, USD, EURO, BTC, OTHER

rewards.description: List of rewards for the vault

decimals.description: Number of decimals of the LP token

lpToken.description: LP token details of the vault

maxCapacity.description: Maximum capacity limit of the vault

isCorrupted.description: Indicates if the vault is corrupted

userEventsIndexed.description: Indicates if user events related to the vault are indexed and available in the API

decimals.description: Number of decimals of the asset

assetPriceInUsd.description: Price of the asset in USD

assetGroup.description: Group of the asset, e.g., ETH, USD, EURO, BTC, OTHER

asset.description: Asset details of the child vault

decimals.description: Number of decimals of the LP token

lpToken.description: LP token details of the child vault

decimals.description: Number of decimals of the asset

assetPriceInUsd.description: Price of the asset in USD

assetGroup.description: Group of the asset, e.g., ETH, USD, EURO, BTC, OTHER

additionalAssets.description: Additional assets of the child vault

decimals.description: Number of decimals of the asset

assetPriceInUsd.description: Price of the asset in USD

assetGroup.description: Group of the asset, e.g., ETH, USD, EURO, BTC, OTHER

depositStepsType.description: Type of transaction steps, either "instant" or "complex"

redeemStepsType.description: Type of transaction steps, either "instant" or "complex"

rewardsSupported.description: Indicates if the vault supports rewards transaction flows

warnings.description: List of warnings related to the vault

endDate.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when this flag expires

flags.description: List of flags with severity and expiry information

totalApy.description: Compounded APY details combining the vault and its underlying vault

intrinsicApy.description: APY details of the underlying vault before compounding

decimals.description: Number of decimals of the asset

assetPriceInUsd.description: Price of the asset in USD

assetGroup.description: Group of the asset, e.g., ETH, USD, EURO, BTC, OTHER

asset.description: Asset details of the underlying vault

apyComposite.description: Composite APY data when vault asset is another vault LP token. When present, totalApy compounds the current vault with the underlying vault and intrinsicApy shows the underlying vault's own APY

items.description: Array of items on the current page

enum: API key required. Please contact vaults.fyi support at https://t.me/vaultsfyisupport or email (support@wallfacer.io) for further assistance.
This endpoint is only available to vaults.fyi PRO subscribers. Please upgrade your API key to access this feature.
The provided API key has exhausted its available credits. Please contact vaults.fyi support at https://t.me/vaultsfyisupport or email (support@wallfacer.io) for further assistance.

get.description: Analyzes a user's existing wallet balances and recommends optimal vault deposit opportunities based on yield performance, risk parameters, and user-defined criteria.

parameters.name: allowedAssets
parameters.description: Assets to be included by symbol(ticker).

parameters.name: disallowedAssets
parameters.description: Assets to be excluded by symbol(ticker). The parameter is ignored if "allowedAssets" is specified.

parameters.name: allowedProtocols
parameters.description: Protocols to be included by name.

parameters.name: disallowedProtocols
parameters.description: Protocols to be excluded by name. The parameter is ignored if "allowedProtocols" is specified.

parameters.name: minTvl
parameters.description: Minimum TVL in USD of the vaults to be included

parameters.name: minVaultScore
parameters.description: Minimum vault score required for a vault to be included

parameters.name: onlyTransactional
parameters.description: Include only vaults that are supported in the transactional interface.

parameters.name: onlyAppFeatured
parameters.description: Include only vaults that are featured in app.vaults.fyi

parameters.name: allowCorrupted
parameters.description: Allow inclusion of corrupted vaults.

parameters.name: allowVaultsWithWarnings
parameters.description: Whether to include vaults with warnings. Defaults to true.

items.description: Include only vaults with provided network(name or CAIP)

parameters.name: allowedNetworks
parameters.description: Networks to be included (name or CAIP).

items.description: Include only vaults with provided network(name or CAIP)

parameters.name: disallowedNetworks
parameters.description: Networks to be excluded (name or CAIP). The parameter is ignored if "allowedNetworks" is specified.

parameters.name: apyInterval
parameters.description: Interval for APY data. Possible values: 1day, 7day, 30day

parameters.name: minApy
parameters.description: Minimum APY of the vault to be included

parameters.name: minUsdAssetValueThreshold
parameters.description: Minimum USD value of the vault to be included

parameters.name: alwaysReturnAssets
parameters.description: Assets to always be included in the response.

parameters.name: maxVaultsPerAsset
parameters.description: Maximum number of vaults to be included per asset.

parameters.name: userAddress
parameters.description: User address to be used for best vault calculation

requestedAddress.description: Address of the user requesting the data

decimals.description: Number of decimals of the asset

assetPriceInUsd.description: Price of the asset in USD

assetGroup.description: Group of the asset, e.g., ETH, USD, EURO, BTC, OTHER

balanceNative.description: Balance of the asset

balanceUsd.description: USD value of the asset

isTransactional.description: Indicates if the vault supports transactional endpoints

isAppFeatured.description: Indicates if the vault is featured in app.vaults.fyi

tvl.description: Total Value Locked (TVL) in the vault

lendUrl.description: URL to lend the asset in the vault

protocolVaultUrl.description: URL to the vault in the protocol

items.description: Best vault details for the requested asset

userBalances.description: Array of user balances with asset and vault details

enum: API key required. Please contact vaults.fyi support at https://t.me/vaultsfyisupport or email (support@wallfacer.io) for further assistance.

parameters.description: Minimum USD value of the asset to be included

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort the results by. Currently, only "balanceUsd" is supported.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Sort order, either asc or desc. Ascending is default.

get.description: Retrieves benchmark APY data for the specified network and benchmark code.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Benchmark code identifier. Available codes: usd, eth

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Network name or CAIP-2 identifier

apy.description: APY interval breakdown for the benchmark

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the benchmark data point

get.description: Retrieves historical benchmark APY data for the specified network and benchmark code with pagination.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (starting from 0)

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: Number of items per page

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Benchmark code identifier. Available codes: usd, eth

parameters.name: fromTimestamp
parameters.description: Timestamp for the start of the time period for which data will be fetched

parameters.name: toTimestamp
parameters.description: Timestamp for the end of the time period for which data will be fetched

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Network name or CAIP-2 identifier

itemsOnPage.description: Number of items on the current page

apy.description: APY interval breakdown for the benchmark

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the benchmark data point

items.description: Array of items on the current page

tags.name: General
tags.description: Core informational endpoints providing essential reference data such as networks, assets, and vaults listings for orientation and exploration.

tags.name: Detailed Vaults
tags.description: Comprehensive vault data endpoints delivering in-depth analytics including APY metrics, TVL statistics, rewards breakdowns, and risk scores.

tags.name: Benchmarks (PRO)
tags.description: Vaults.fyi curated benchmark endpoints providing aggregated yield performance data for USD and ETH denominated assets across selected networks.

tags.name: Historical (PRO)
tags.description: Premium endpoints returning time-series historical data for vault metrics, enabling trend analysis and performance tracking over customizable periods.

tags.name: Portfolio (PRO)
tags.description: Advanced endpoints providing detailed information about user balances, active positions, historical interactions, and tailored investment opportunities.
